title: DENTAL HYGIENE CLINIC - 211info
text: CLARK COLLEGE DENTAL HYGIENE CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers exams, x-rays, scaling and polishing, sealants, fillings, diet analysis, and personalized prevention education. 1933 Fort Vancouver Way Vancouver, WA 98663 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday by appointment (360) 992-2158 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (360) 992-2158 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Screening appointments are free, dental services offered at low cost, payments are accepted in cash or check only DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: General Dentistry Oral Health Education/Information Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - CLARK COLLEGE EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - VETERAN CENTER OF EXCELLENCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLARK COLLEGE
